title: iguanura bicornis
intro: Iguanura bicornis, also known as the Borneo walking palm, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Arecaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Iguanura bicornis include reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Iguanura bicornis often involve extracting its sap or leaves to create teas, tinctures, or infusions that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
